name: @aflo/opportunity-intelligence
description: Opportunity & Risk Intelligence: a deterministic trusted-source registry of public programs/notices with jurisdiction, publication/effective/expiration dates, eligibility fields, and source citations; deterministic profile-relevance matching (surface-worthiness, never an eligibility determination); a strict safe-language boundary; and human-review gates for legal/claims notices. No AI, no external calls — mock/seed data only.
